prompt: A city skyline of Mumbai seen through rising water, the lower half of buildings submerged, the Gateway of India monument partially underwater, calm ominous water reflecting the sky, muted blue-gray tones, no text, no labels, no chart, no infographic, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, melancholic
dataset_name: Sea Level Rise Scenarios for Indian Coastal Cities
insight: Mumbai's sea level rose 4.44 cm between 1987-2021. By 2040, over 10% of Mumbai land will be submerged. By 2100, 76.2 cm rise under medium-emission scenario.
